questions.q: The actress Savitri was a leading star primarily of which two South Indian film industries?
questions.explanation: Savitri was a celebrated actress of both Telugu and Tamil cinema during the 1950s and 1960s.

questions.q: By what honorific title, also used for the 2018 biopic about her, is the actress Savitri popularly remembered?
questions.explanation: Savitri is popularly remembered as 'Mahanati' (the great actress), the title of the acclaimed 2018 biopic about her.

questions.q: In which 1957 fantasy classic, drawn from a Mahabharata sub-tale, did Savitri play Sasirekha?
questions.explanation: Savitri played Sasirekha in the 1957 Telugu-Tamil fantasy classic Maya Bazaar.

questions.q: In which 1953 tragic romance did Savitri play Parvati (Paro) opposite Akkineni Nageswara Rao?
questions.explanation: Savitri played Parvati in the 1953 Telugu film Devadasu, an adaptation of Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay's novel.

questions.q: In which year did the biopic 'Mahanati', based on the life of actress Savitri, release?
questions.explanation: The biopic Mahanati, dramatising Savitri's life, was released in 2018.

questions.q: Which actress played the title role of Savitri in the 2018 biopic 'Mahanati'?
questions.explanation: Keerthy Suresh portrayed Savitri in the 2018 biopic Mahanati, winning wide acclaim for the role.

questions.q: In which 1955 comedy did Savitri star alongside N. T. Rama Rao and Jamuna under L. V. Prasad's direction?
questions.explanation: Savitri starred in the 1955 Telugu comedy Missamma, directed by L. V. Prasad.

questions.q: The actress Savitri belonged to which decade-spanning golden era, beginning her major film career in the early 1950s?
questions.explanation: Savitri rose to prominence and dominated South Indian cinema during the 1950s and 1960s.

questions.q: Besides acting, in which other key filmmaking role did Savitri also work during her career?
questions.explanation: Savitri also worked as a film director, helming films such as Chinnari Papalu (1968) and Mathru Devata (1969).

questions.q: Which fellow Telugu and Tamil superstar was Savitri's frequent on-screen partner in films like Devadasu and Donga Ramudu?
questions.explanation: Akkineni Nageswara Rao (ANR) was Savitri's frequent co-star in Telugu classics such as Devadasu and Donga Ramudu.

questions.q: Savitri married which Tamil film actor, with whom she shared a well-known but turbulent personal life?
questions.explanation: Savitri married Tamil actor Gemini Ganesan, and their relationship is a central thread of the biopic Mahanati.

questions.q: In which year was the actress Savitri born?
questions.explanation: Savitri was born in 1936 in Chirravuru, in present-day Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: In which year did the legendary actress Savitri pass away?
questions.explanation: Savitri died in 1981 after a prolonged illness and a period of ill health.

questions.q: In the 1957 classic Maya Bazaar, Savitri's character Sasirekha is paired with which character played by Akkineni Nageswara Rao?
questions.explanation: In Maya Bazaar, Savitri's Sasirekha is in love with Abhimanyu, played by Akkineni Nageswara Rao.

questions.q: Which 1962 Telugu comedy featured Savitri alongside N. T. Rama Rao, Jamuna and Suryakantham in a family entertainer about two contrasting daughters-in-law?
questions.explanation: Savitri starred in the 1962 Telugu hit comedy Gundamma Katha alongside N. T. Rama Rao and Jamuna.

questions.q: Savitri delivered an acclaimed performance in the 1964 Telugu film 'Mooga Manasulu', which was later remade in Hindi as which film?
questions.explanation: Mooga Manasulu (1964), starring Savitri, was remade in Hindi in 1967 as Milan.

questions.q: Director Nag Ashwin made the 2018 biopic 'Mahanati' about Savitri. Which production house backed this film?
questions.explanation: Mahanati (2018) was produced by Vyjayanthi Movies (with Swapna Cinema), with Nag Ashwin directing.

questions.q: Keerthy Suresh's portrayal of Savitri in 'Mahanati' earned her which top honour at the 66th National Film Awards?
questions.explanation: Keerthy Suresh won the National Film Award for Best Actress for playing Savitri in Mahanati.

questions.q: In which Tamil-language tragic remake did Savitri reprise the female lead of the Devadas story opposite a leading Tamil hero?
questions.explanation: Savitri also played the heroine in the 1953 Tamil version of Devadas, made simultaneously with the Telugu film.

questions.q: Which veteran character actor played Ghatotkacha and was a frequent senior co-star of Savitri in films like Maya Bazaar?
questions.explanation: S. V. Ranga Rao, famed for playing Ghatotkacha in Maya Bazaar, frequently appeared alongside Savitri.

questions.q: In which 1965 Tamil film did Savitri and Sivaji Ganesan play siblings sharing a deep brother-sister bond?
questions.explanation: Savitri and Sivaji Ganesan played devoted siblings in the 1965 Tamil film Pasamalar.

questions.q: The actress Savitri was honoured with which title by the public and press, reflecting her stature as a screen artiste?
questions.explanation: Savitri was widely honoured with the Tamil title 'Nadigaiyar Thilagam', meaning pride of actresses.

questions.q: Savitri made her directorial debut with which 1968 Telugu film?
questions.explanation: Savitri directed the 1968 Telugu film Chinnari Papalu, marking her debut as a director.

questions.q: In her early career before stardom, in which 1952 Telugu film directed by L. V. Prasad did Savitri appear in a small role?
questions.explanation: Savitri appeared in a small role in the 1952 Telugu film Pelli Chesi Choodu before her breakthrough.

questions.q: Savitri was born in a village in which present-day district region of Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Savitri was born in Chirravuru, in the Guntur region of present-day Andhra Pradesh.

questions.q: Before entering films, the young Savitri trained and performed in which classical performing-art tradition?
questions.explanation: Savitri trained in classical dance and stage drama in her youth, which prepared her for her film career.

questions.q: In the framing narrative of 'Mahanati' (2018), a young journalist investigates Savitri's life. Which actress played that journalist, Madhuravani?
questions.explanation: Samantha Akkineni played journalist Madhuravani in the framing story of Mahanati.

questions.q: Which composer scored the celebrated 1953 film Devadasu, in which Savitri played Parvati?
questions.explanation: The music of Devadasu (1953) was composed by C. R. Subbaraman, with Ghantasala completing some songs after Subbaraman's death.

questions.q: In 'Mahanati' (2018), which actor portrayed Savitri's husband Gemini Ganesan?
questions.explanation: Dulquer Salmaan portrayed Gemini Ganesan, Savitri's husband, in the biopic Mahanati.

questions.q: Savitri's later life was marked by financial difficulty and ill health, partly attributed to which factor often noted by biographers?
options: Generosity, business losses and declining health
A ban imposed by film studios
questions.explanation: Savitri's later years were marked by financial troubles from her generosity and business losses, alongside failing health, leading to her death in 1981.
